note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. — GHOST CURRENCY (prior 4, derivable): capture cadence = 1 ghost / 6s (possession recurs every 6s; the 100-cumulative-team-hit gate clears well inside 6s for a 5-unit team — her own ramped MG alone lands ~60-100 hits/6s; ⚑ hit-gate may bind in slow/charge-weapon teams). Two MODES (first = default): 'rotation' = standard control-team context, sole B3 bursting on her 40s CD (~4 bursts/180s at ~t15,57,99,141). Derived trajectory: burst ▼6 floors her at 1 ghost, +1/6s rebuild → pre-burst peak = 1+floor(42/6)=7, sawtooth 1→7 avg ~4 — the ghost count NEVER reaches 13 while bursting on CD (needs 72 burst-free seconds from the floor). Consequences: burst always takes the 6-hit branch (800%×6=4800% flatDamage, flavor sequential — one merged hit, expectation-equivalent to 6×800%); the 13-hit branch is UNREACHABLE (verbatim in unmodeled.burst); S2's 1100% capture-at-max-capacity nuke fires ZERO times (never at 13). S1 tiers: ≥1 ghost (first capture t≈6, burst 'maintains at least 1') ≈ permanent → casterAtkPct 16.2 passive full value to Water allies; ≥4 ghost tier on only from ~18s after each burst until the next → derived windows [33,57],[75,99],[117,141],[159,180] ≈ 93s/180 ≈ 0.52 uptime → elemAdvantageDamagePct shipped 17.5 = 35 × 0.5 ⚑. 'no-burst' mode = solo probe / never-bursting context (a lone B3 makes zero FBs): ghosts ramp 0→13 by t≈78, ≥4 tier ≈ 87% uptime → full 35 shipped, and the S2 nuke fires on every capture at max ≈ every 6s from t≈84 → 17 procs; encoded as ONE passive dot 1100%/6s dur 102 (= exactly 17 ticks, count-equivalent, phase shifted early — damage-equivalent solo since no FB and her buffs are static; prior 3 anti-overlap encoding). WARNING: do not select no-burst mode for a team where she actually bursts (the nuke dot + burst would double-count her economy). SKIPPED (unmodeled, verbatim): possession/capture bookkeeping lines (no direct effect of their own — folded into the derived trajectory above); tier-header lines (ghost-count gate is approximated by uptime haircut + modes, not tracked); burst ghost-decrement lines (bookkeeping); the 13-hit burst branch (unreachable in both modeled contexts). ⚑ LIST: (1) MG cadence tuple pullsPerSec/reloadFrames 171/wind-up — datamine-unverified; (2) capture cadence 6s vs hit-gated; (3) ≥4-tier uptime 0.5 in rotation (FB-cadence-dependent); (4) no-burst nuke count 17 + ramp-to-13 time 78s; (5) at-burst ghost count never 13 (verify vs UI counter); (6) whether S2's +40% self ATK (same burstCast) snapshots into her own 4800% burst nuke — engine same-frame ordering unverified. Kit is Water/MG/Attacker/B3, slug elegg-boom-and-shock (NOT base elegg).

skill1: Ability: Find and capture ghosts possessing the enemy.
Required hit count: 100 time(s) in total, cumulative across all allies.
Effect: Captures 1 ghost when the required hit count reaches 100%. A maximum of 13 ghost(s) can be captured.
Effects vary according to the number of ghosts. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it:
burst: Number of ghosts ▼ 6. Maintains at least 1 ghost.
Deals 800% of final ATK as damage. Attacks sequentially for 13 time(s).

caveats: skill1: Elemental Advantage Damage ▲35% (4+ ghosts) shipped at 17.5% = derived ~50% uptime in rotation mode — unmeasured ghost-economy estimate
skill2: the 1100% capture-at-max-capacity nuke fires ONLY in no-burst mode (bursting every ~40s the ghost count never reaches 13); its ~17 procs/180s are a derived estimate
burst: modeled as the 6-hit branch (800% x 6 = 4800%); the 13-ghost 13-hit branch is unreachable when bursting on cooldown
cadence: datamined MG fire rate + reloadFrames 171 are unverified (mandatory cadence flag)
